<a id="class-hsplitcontainer"></a>

# HSplitContainer

**Inherits:** [SplitContainer](class_splitcontainer.md#class-splitcontainer) **<** [Container](class_container.md#class-container) **<** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A container that splits two child controls horizontally and provides a grabber for adjusting the split ratio.

## Description

A container that accepts only two child controls, then arranges them horizontally and creates a divisor between them. The divisor can be dragged around to change the size relation between the child controls.
